title: Chief Pack
description: Modpack for general performance improvements. Originally officially made for ChiefXD's SMP.
body:
# Chief SMP Modpack

### Shader support built in

![Shader support built in!](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/dppITqYq/images/3ff480c119ab77d3603e3b203a12f17adcfd1e57.png 'Shader support built in')
Complimentary Shaders - custom config

## Overview

# | This project is no longer in active development |

The Chief SMP Modpack is a modpack that is designed to improve your experience on the Chief SMP. It includes several performance optimisations, from the likes of Sodium, all the way to proximity voice chat and shaders! Now also offering optimised culling, item lookup information and more.

We even bundle a couple of our favourite shaders with the modpack so you can try them out!


## Installation guide

Click [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play) to learn how to install this modpack using the Modrinth App.

## Authors

- Waffle
- Contributing mod developers
